name: Sovol SV05 Sprite Pro
machine_start_gcode:
; Sovol SV05 Sprite Pro start G-code
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; start bed heating
M104 S150 ; preheat hotend (no ooze)
M190 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; wait for bed temp — home with hot bed for consistent probe
G28 ; home all axes
M420 S1 ; restore saved bed mesh
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] ; wait for hotend temp
G1 Z5 F3000 ; lift nozzle
G1 X0 Y0 F3000 ; move to left edge
G1 Z0.3 F300 ; drop to purge height
G92 E0 ; reset extruder
G1 Y200 E20 F500 ; purge line — front to back
G1 Y0 E40 F500 ; purge line — back to front
G1 Y50 E45 F500 ; purge line — 1/4 bed
G92 E0 ; reset extruder
G1 Z2 F3000 ; lift before print
machine_end_gcode:
; End G-code
G91 ; relative moves
G1 E-2 F2700 ; retract
G1 Z10 F3000 ; lift Z
G90 ; absolute moves
G1 X10 Y200 F3000 ; park nozzle
M104 S0 ; hotend off
M140 S0 ; bed off
M107 ; fan off
M500 ; save Z offset (baby steps)
M84 ; motors off
printer_notes:
Sovol SV05 + Creality Sprite Pro direct drive
CR Touch probe: X=-37.5 Y=+6.2 Z=-11.975
Homes X/Y to MAX (rear-right), Z to MIN
Marlin 2.1.2.7 custom firmware
